name: Kevin Ryan
data_note: Limited public information available. Check your county clerk's office or the Illinois State Board of Elections for filing info.
bio: Kevin Ryan is a Chicago Public Schools teacher (18 years at Lindblom High School, West Englewood) and U.S. Marine Corps Reserve officer. He served as a policy adviser at the U.S. Treasury under the Biden Administration and holds degrees from U of I, Oxford (diplomacy), and Georgetown. His central campaign platform is a constitutional amendment to establish campaign spending limits — making him one of the most relevant candidates to TheJacket's mission. (Source: Ballotpedia; ILSOS filing confirmed)

donors.name: Individual small-dollar donors only (no corporate money)
donors.amount_note: Campaign explicitly rejects all corporate donations per Central Illinois Proud interview. Only individual contributions accepted.

career_history.highlight: Active reservist; military service alongside teaching career

career_history.org: Lindblom Math & Science Academy, West Englewood
career_history.highlight: 18 years in the classroom; brother died of overdose, which inspired teaching career
Federal policy work on economic issues

policy_platform.position: Constitutional amendment to establish campaign spending limits. Cites this as the root cause of all other political failures.
Living wage for all full-time workers. Medicare for All. Housing and education as basic rights.
Abolish the death penalty; prison reform; anti-poverty programs.
Term limits, age limits in Congress, filibuster reform, ranked choice voting.
